buys.thesis: Core AI position: 85% revenue growth, reasonable 31 P/E for the growth, undisputed AI compute leader. Down slightly today offers a fair entry.
Best risk/reward among mega-cap AI: 27 P/E with 22% revenue growth, strong Gemini/TPU story, slight pullback today.
Cheapest mega-cap AI play at 20.6 P/E with 33% revenue growth. Down 1% today on internal noise is a buying opportunity.
Custom AI silicon leader with 48% revenue growth and a fresh $35B AI infra platform deal. Slight dip today is attractive.
Pure-play AI cloud with 111% revenue growth, just deployed NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 first at rack scale. Speculative but high asymmetric upside.
85% revenue growth, down 2.6% today offers entry into a leading AI software name with Army Innovation Corps tailwinds. Smaller size due to high 142 P/E.
Diversified AI/cloud exposure via AWS at a reasonable 31.6 P/E. Down 1.5% today on Anthropic news provides a discount.
